failures.description: The agent misread the ProductCatalogSearch output and selected the last, most expensive listed item instead of the first, cheapest item.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The relevant tool output was available at index 3 and was sorted by ascending price. The first item was item_id 1240311797 at $137.17, making it the cheapest available Electric Kettle. At index 4, the Executor synthesized an answer claiming item_id 2243454707 at $164.46 was cheapest, contradicting the tool result. This is not an invalid tool call, unsupported intent, or underspecified request; it is a reasoning error over the returned evidence.
